```

messages.content:
Create the file handlers/webhook.py with exactly this content, using write_file:

```
async def handle_stripe_webhook(request, signing_secret):
    payload = await request.body()
    sig = request.headers.get('Stripe-Signature')
    event = stripe.Webhook.construct_event(payload, sig, signing_secret)
    if event.type == 'invoice.payment_failed':
        await mark_subscription_past_due(event.data.object.customer)
```

async def handle_stripe_webhook(request, signing_secret):
    payload = await request.body()
    sig = request.headers.get('Stripe-Signature')
    event = stripe.Webhook.construct_event(payload, sig, signing_secret)
    if event.type == 'invoice.payment_failed':
        await mark_subscription_past_due(event.data.object.customer)

messages.content:
Create the file db/migrations/0042_add_index.sql with exactly this content, using write_file:

```
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orders_tenant_created
    ON orders (tenant_id, created_at DESC)
    WHERE status IN ('pending', 'processing');
ANALYZE orders;
```

```
